model_decision.issue: Working generator is deepseek-v3.2-exp, NOT deepseek-v4-pro. Per code comment I-bug-091 (2026-05-09), V4 Pro was deliberately reverted — structurally breaks the strict_verify provenance-token pipeline. But the OVH procurement spec + transparency docs + runbook all say V4 Pro.
model_decision.options: A — V3.2-Exp is the demo generator (works today, update docs) | B — fix V4 Pro compat first (real Issue, ~1-2 days) | C — user already knows the history, just picks

I_bug_113.blocks: #3 — the fallback-laptop drill build AND the Vexxhost deploy build
I_bug_113.issue: Unbounded langchain pins in requirements.txt:35-40 cause pip resolver runaway (7+ min, no convergence) once langchain 1.x is in the index. Fix is capping to <1.0.0 at the working versions — but touches the pipeline-A surface, needs a regression smoke. Filed, not yet started.
